criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store ratings, reviews, and download statistics.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features within the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and tech blogs.

criteria.name: User Base
criteria.description: The size and growth rate of the app's user base.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store download statistics, market analysis reports.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The uniqueness and innovativeness of the app's features.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app descriptions, and user reviews.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: The design, usability, and overall user experience of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app descriptions, and design critiques.
